svg.text: SET 4 -- bone rim / one hue / hard mass
grid 200x320, drawn at 20x32. stroke-behind rim: 10u ink + 9u bone, on the outer contour only. one currentColor region per creature.
A. SIZE LADDER on deep space #1a1a2e -- frame 1 (left) and frame 2 (right) at 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 tall
B. 4x INSPECTION (128 tall) on panel #22223a -- f1, f2 per species
C. 3 SPECIES x 4 PLAYER COLORS x 3 BACKGROUNDS, all at 32 tall (true play size)
D. THE 18 PX RUNG -- auction dock badge, full creature (no head crop), 4 colors on all 3 backgrounds
Silhouette test: mechtron = narrow hard rectangle. flapper = wide horizontal wingspan. leggite = tall thin wobble on a leg fringe.
Those three outer masses are distinguishable at 18 px with the faces switched off, which is the whole design.
